features.name: First Proficiency
features.description: You gain proficiency with light armor.

features.name: Second Proficiency
features.description: You gain proficiency with medium armor.

features.name: Simple Weapon Proficiency
features.description: You are proficient with simple weapons.

features.name: Martial Weapon Proficiency
features.description: You are proficient with martial weapons.
Choose two skills from Arcana, Deception, Performance, Insight, Investigation, Nature, Religion.

features.name: First Attack
features.description: On your first turn of a combat, you can make one melee weapon attack as a bonus action.

features.name: Combat Style
features.description: You gain a combat style feature, such as Archflinger or Archery.

features.name: Pact of the Chain
features.description: The warlock gains the Pact of the Chain feature.

features.name: Otherworldly Prodigy
features.description: The warlock gains the Otherworldly Prodigy feature.

features.name: Dark Invocation (Chain)
features.description: The warlock selects a spell from the Warlock Spell list and adds it to their spellbook. This spell must have a level equal to or lower than half the warlock's level, rounded up. The warlock can use this feature once per day.

features.name: Eldritch Invocations
features.description: At 1st level, you gain two eldritch invocations of your choice. These are detailed in the Eldritch Invocations table. When you gain a warlock level that allows you to gain additional eldricth invocations, you can choose from any of them, as shown in the Warlock table.

features.name: Find Familiar
features.description: You learn the find familiar spell and can cast it as a ritual. The spell doesn't count against the number of spells known. When you cast the spell, you choose one of the following forms for your familiar: pseudodragon, quasit, sprite. Additionally, you take a action, when you attack with your magic weapon, you can make the familiar attack instead as part of the attack action.
